case_title: GARY NELSON AND ASSOCIATES DBA NELSON PERSONNAL VS DAVID GREEN AND COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,755.00 FILED BY GARY NELSON AND ASSOCIATES DBA NELSON PERSONNAL AS TO DEFENDANT DAVID GREEN AND COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
